name: Gemma 1
tagline: First open Gemma; 2B and 7B sizes, lightweight cousin of Gemini.
metaDescription: Gemma 1 (Google), released 2024-02-21 — part of the Gemma (open weights) line. First open Gemma; 2B and 7B sizes, lightweight cousin of Gemini.
overview: Gemma 1 is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemma (open weights) line. Released 2024-02-21. Google's family of open-weight models derived from Gemini research, for local and commercial use.
What's notable in this version: First open Gemma; 2B and 7B sizes, lightweight cousin of Gemini.
